mapper.select:
SELECT lr.* FROM tb_lend_review lr LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON lr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_book b ON lr.book_id = b.id
${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT lr.id, lr.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, lr.book_id AS bookId, b.book_name AS bookName, lr.apply_time, lr.lend_days AS lendDays, lr.apply_type AS applyType, lr.state, lr.operator_id AS operatorId, op.name AS operatorName, lr.create_time AS createTime, lr.update_time AS updateTime FROM tb_lend_review lr LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON lr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_book b ON lr.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN tb_user op ON lr.operator_id = op.id
${ew.sqlSegment}
